content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.90%, VIX +8% to 18.20, Bank Nifty -0.79%, PSU Bank -1.82%, Realty -2.44% — broad risk-off. But Pharma +0.53%, IT +0.27% defensive bid holding, and several held names (COFORGE +7.8%, TATACONSUM +9.2%, LAURUSLABS +5.3%, SUNPHARMA +2.2%) gapping up strongly on Q4 catalysts. Book is in strong shape with multiple winners — focus is trailing SLs on gainers to lock gains, no fresh admits warranted with VIX spiking and CPI data due May 12.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23845,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 123.61 vs SL 121.00 (-2.1%). Gold consolidating after big rally. Hold with current SL; no trail justified at -1.2% P&L."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 832.00,
      "new_target": 870.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.4% gain, CMP 847.35 near 52w high 843.15 broken. SL 832 already at breakeven+ giving 1.8% gap to CMP — compliant with 1% trail-gap floor. Q4 print strong, MOFSL Buy. Holding through CPI May 12 with locked-in gain. No-op MODIFY: SL already at desired level so this is HOLD-equivalent."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1358.97,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.9% gain, CMP 1385.50. SL 1358.97 = -1.9% from CMP, exactly within trail-gap discipline (>1% below LTP). Already a solid trail well above entry 1259 (+7.9% locked). Brokerage targets 1690-2020 imply meaningful upside. Hold for runner. This is HOLD-equivalent — SL stays."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.3% intraday on chemicals Q4. SL 2740 = -1.7% from CMP 2788.80. Hold with current SL; trail not yet justified at +0.3%."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.4%, CMP 9050.50 near ATH. 3.3x volume on Q4 print. SL 8950 = -1.1% from CMP, working SL. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.5%, CMP 10599.50. Buyback at 12000 floor 29 May. Auto sector -1.29% today drag. SL 10440 = -1.5% from CMP, intact thesis."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.5%, FMCG up sectorally but DABUR muted. Q4 +16% PAT, raised FY27 guidance bullish. SL 468 = -2.0% from CMP 478. Hold for FMCG defensive bid."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1255.00,
      "new_target": 1320.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.6%, CMP 1270.40. SL 1255 = -1.2% from CMP, compliant with 1% trail-gap floor, locks +2.4% gain above entry 1226. Pharma at 52w high, CDMO momentum. Already at this level — HOLD-equivalent."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.3% from entry 1248, CMP 1257.40 after +9.2% gap on Q4 beat. SL 1198 = -4.7% (wide for breakout entry, OK). Let the breakout run; trail prematurely on day-1 risks self-stopout on normal noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.1% flat, capital goods at record highs. SL 850 = -1.7% from CMP 865. Q4 order book +61% YoY. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.2%, near 52w high. Results May 20. SL 7950 = -1.6% from CMP 8085. Hold; will reassess into earnings (binary event ~7 sessions out, outside 3-session rule for now)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.1%, CMP 1874.70 near 52w high. Pharma sector leader. SL 1830 = -2.4% from CMP, intact. Q4 results May 21. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.2%, CMP 1668.70. Research surfaced BEARISH (-0.08 modifier) — Q4 PAT -15% YoY, peer underperformance. However SL 1610 = -3.5% from CMP and entry already set; thesis weakened but not broken. Hold for now, tight watch — if breaks 1610 SL it fires; do not preemptively close per Rule 17."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Below SL trail threshold (-1.2% P&L); SL 121 intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 832.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven+ locking 1.5% gain; trail-gap 1.8% within discipline."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1358.97,
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed to +7.9% locked, 1.9% gap to CMP — compliant. Let runner extend."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Only +0.3%, trail not yet justified."
    },
    {

      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Marginal -0.4%, SL working."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "-1.5%, SL 10440 intact, buyback floor at 12000 May 29."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "-1.5%, FMCG defensive, SL intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1255.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at +2.4% lock-in, 1.2% gap to CMP — compliant."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Day-1 of breakout, do not premature-trail."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat, SL working."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Earnings May 20 — outside 3-session window for now, will reassess closer."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Pharma leader near 52w high, SL working."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Research turned BEARISH but per Rule 17, do not pre-empt SL on intraday wobble. SL 1610 will fire if hit."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BULLISH-rated candidates from research not admitted today with explicit reasons: (1) TORNTPHARM (+0.06) — pharma cluster: already hold SUNPHARMA, LAURUSLABS, APOLLOHOSP, LALPATHLAB; adding 5th pharma name on Q4 May 21 binary 7 sessions out violates pre-event discipline. (2) MCX (+0.05) — earnings call TODAY 4pm IST, post-result entry violates 3-session binary rule (results already out, but call commentary is the live binary). (3) AFFLE / THERMAX — gap-up momentum names with extended charts on a -0.9% Nifty / +8% VIX day; reward-to-chase ratio poor on risk-off tape. (4) INFY/HCLTECH — IT defensive but COFORGE already provides cluster exposure +9.9%, adding lower-conviction Tier-1 redundant. (5) BIOCON / ASIANPAINT / APTUS — neutral-to-modest signals, no edge against existing high-conviction book. Reason for restraint: VIX +8% to 18.20 with CPI print tomorrow (May 12) is a binary macro event — per philosophy 'Binary macro/geopolitical event days are NOT accumulation days.' This is an explicit Rule-18 audit, not anchoring on morning view.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 52% / cash 48% — below 80% soft target, but VIX spike + CPI tomorrow justifies caution per philosophy. Book quality is strong: 5 winners (COFORGE +9.9%, MARICO +3.4%, LAURUSLABS +3.6%, SRF, TATACONSUM positive) vs modest losers. Open pending order: TATACONSUM CNC LIMIT 1240 from 387 min ago — CMP now 1257.40, won't fill at that limit; should cancel to clean up book but already have TATACONSUM position from a separate fill so the LIMIT is functionally a duplicate request that won't fill. HFCL MIS LIMIT 133.50 is 7731 min old — stale across sessions, MIS LIMIT cannot survive across days, broker should have auto-cancelled. Both pending orders are effectively dead. Net P&L day -2.47% from realized -28k, manage carefully into close. No new admits today."
}
